title: Lifecycle status enum

commands.summary: RP00 control-plane contract validation passed; subphase RP00.P01.M03.S05; status production_ready.
Spec requirement ledger validation passed; requirement_count 227.
Law Firm OS product contract validation passed; modules 9/9, principles 9/9, invariants 7/7.
Weighted implementation ledger validation passed; 3,300 source micro phases and 54,355 implementation subphases.
Full microphase plan validation passed; 30 release programs, 10 standard phases, 11 micro phases per standard phase.
Goal closeout protocol validation passed; Claude gate requires claude-opus-4-8 effort=max read-only.
Node test suite passed; 42 tests passed, 0 failed.

notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.
Commands are local validation/test commands and do not write product runtime state.
S05 implements only the HermesGate Lifecycle status enum and leaves RP00.P01.M03.S06 Ownership metadata as the next subphase.

evidence_summary.claude_review_dependency: C00 actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only review required before production_ready
evidence_summary.human_approval_boundary: Human approval is not replaced by Hermes, Claude Code, Codex, or this subphase.
